creator: gouders@et.bocholt.fh-gelsenkirchen.de
text:
In a <literallayout> section of the FAQ a colon is used after one
	file name but not after another only about five lines later.

Fix: If you think that should be fixed, here's the diff:

*** book.sgml	2000/02/23 20:47:39	1.6
--- book.sgml	2000/02/23 21:09:48
***************
